title: Cynanchica accrescens
intro: Cynanchum accrescens, also known as Cynanchica accrescens, is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly referred to as a type of milkweed or dogbane. Traditionally, Cynanchum accrescens has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its reported health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. The bioactive constituents of Cynanchum accrescens include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal medicine, Cynanchum accrescens is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, with the most common preparations being the dried root and aerial parts, used to treat a range of health complaints.
